name: the extractor segments a markdown standard into discrete candidate rules by heading
command:
printf '# Guide

## Use const not var
Always use const in TypeScript.

## Prefer interfaces
Use an interface.
' > g.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/extract-rules-from-url.sh" --source g.md --source-id g --json > out.json 2>e.txt; grep -q 'rules=2' e.txt && node -e 'const r=require(process.cwd()+"/out.json");if(r.length!==2)process.exit(1)' && echo extracted-2 1>&2
